summary: The diff implements REQ-1 fully. AuthGate.tsx enforces the 'TailsTheBeast124' username restriction by rendering AccessDeniedScreen for any authenticated user whose profile name does not match. AccessDeniedScreen includes a logout button that calls the provided onLogout callback. The constraint of not modifying useInternetIdentity.ts or useActor.ts appears respected. No missing requirements were detected.

hallucinated_features.description: OnboardingFlow blocks registration of the username 'TailsTheBeast124' with a 'Cannot be admin' error during onboarding
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires restricting login access to TailsTheBeast124 in AuthGate.tsx. Blocking that username during onboarding/registration was not requested and is not mentioned in any requirement or acceptance criterion.
